widgets.name: Form_EditionIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: The edition identifier of the form including the form number and edition (the date is typically formatted YYYY/MM).

widgets.name: Producer_CustomerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g., agency or brokerage).

widgets.name: Form_CompletionDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The date on which the form is completed.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

widgets.name: Producer_FullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The full name of the producer / agency.

widgets.name: Policy_PolicyNumberIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The identifier assigned by the insurer to the policy, or submission, being referenced exactly as it appears on the policy, including prefix and suffix symbols.  If required for self-insurance, the self-insured license or contract number.

widgets.name: Policy_EffectiveDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The effective date of the policy.  The date that the terms and conditions of the policy commence.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

widgets.name: Insurer_FullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The insurer's full legal company name(s) as found in the file copy of the policy.  Use the actual name of the company within the group to which the policy has been issued.  This is not the insurer's group name or trade name.

widgets.name: Insurer_NAICCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The identification code assigned to the insurer by the National Association of Insurance Commissioners (NAIC).

widgets.name: NamedInsured_FullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The named insured(s) as it / they will appear on the policy declarations page.

widgets.name: Policy_Status_NewIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the response expected from the company is a new issued policy.

widgets.name: Policy_Status_RenewIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the response expected from the company is a renewed policy.

widgets.name: Policy_PolicyType_UmbrellaIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the type of policy is umbrella.

widgets.name: Policy_PolicyType_ExcessIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the type of policy is excess.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_OccurrenceIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates "coverage trigger" is on an occurrence basis on an excess or umbrella liability policy.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_ClaimsMadeIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the "coverage trigger" is on a claims-made basis on an excess or umbrella liability policy.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_VoluntaryIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if the excess is voluntary.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_Transactiontype_OtherIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the transaction type is other than those listed.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_Transactiontype_OtherDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the other transaction type.

widgets.name: PriorCoverage_PolicyNumberIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The policy number of the previous coverage.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_ProposedRetroactiveDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The retroactive date you are requesting for the policy being applied for. This is the proposed earliest date for which an occurrence could "trigger" coverage under a Claims Made policy.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_CurrentRetroactiveDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The current retroactive date should be shown if the Umbrella is over a Claims Made primary policy. If the current retroactive date is different from the proposed retroactive date, an explanation must be provided.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_Umbrella_EachOccurrenceAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The excess or umbrella liability each occurrence limit.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_Umbrella_AggregateAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The excess or umbrella liability aggregate limit should be listed as whole dollar amount, as governed by the policy.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_OtherCoverageLimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The excess or umbrella liability other coverage limit should be listed as a whole dollar amount, as governed by the policy.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_OtherCoverageDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of other coverage (not the limit) on the excess or umbrella liability policy.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s).

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_Umbrella_DeductibleOrRetentionAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter deductible: The excess or umbrella liability deductible or retention amount.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_FirstDollarDefenceCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. Indicates that first dollar defense coverage is requested.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_EmployeeBenefits_EachEmployeeLimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The each employee limit for employee benefits coverage.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_EmployeeBenefits_AggregateLimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The aggregate limit for employee benefits coverage.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_EmployeeBenefits_DeductibleOrRetentionAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The retention amount for employee benefits coverage.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_EmployeeBenefits_RetroactiveDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The retroactive date for employee benefits coverage.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_EmployeeBenefits_ProgramName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The full name of the benefit program.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Location_ProducerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The location number for the premises.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_Location_FullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The name of the location.  For commercial policies, this may be a company name.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_PhysicalAddress_LineOne_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The first address line of the commercial structure.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_PhysicalAddress_CityName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The city of the commercial structure.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_PhysicalAddress_StateOrProvinceCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The state or province code of the commercial structure.

widgets.name: CommercialStructure_PhysicalAddress_PostalCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter code: The postal code of the commercial structure.

widgets.name: BusinessInformation_OperationsDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the operations of this risk.  A restatement of the products classification wording is often not sufficient (e.g., "Metal Goods Manufacturing NOC" could include anything from paper clips to bridge girders).

widgets.name: BusinessInformation_TotalPayrollAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The total annual payroll of the business in whole dollars.

widgets.name: BusinessInformation_AnnualGrossReceiptsAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The total annual gross sales or receipts.

widgets.name: BusinessInformation_ForeignGrossSalesAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The estimated annual foreign gross sales.

widgets.name: BusinessInformation_EmployeeCount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter number: The number of employees.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_Automobile_InsurerFullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The full name of the insurer of the underlying automobile policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_Automobile_PolicyNumberIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The policy number of the underlying automobile policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_Automobile_PolicyEffectiveDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The effective date of the underlying automobile policy. (MM/DD/YYYY)

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_Automobile_PolicyExpirationDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The expiration date of the underlying automobile policy. (MM/DD/YYYY)

widgets.name: Vehicle_CombinedSingleLimit_EachAccidentAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The vehicle combined single limit liability each accident amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying automobile policy.

widgets.name: Vehicle_BodilyInjury_PerAccidentLimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The vehicle policy, bodily injury per accident limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying automobile policy.

widgets.name: Vehicle_BodilyInjury_PerPersonLimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The vehicle policy, bodily injury per person limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying automobile policy.

widgets.name: Vehicle_PropertyDamage_PerAccidentLimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The vehicle policy, property damage per accident limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying automobile policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_Automobile_CombinedSingleLimitPremiumAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The combined single limit premium on the underlying automobile policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_Automobile_BodilyInjuryPremiumAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The bodily injury premium amount on the underlying automobile policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_Automobile_PropertyDamageEachAccidentPremiumAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The property damage premium amount on the underlying automobile policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_Automobile_ModificationFactor_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter rate: The combined rating modification and experience modification debit or credit as they apply.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_OccurrenceIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the general liability policy, occurrence basis applies. As used here, this is on the underlying general liability policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_ClaimsMadeIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the "claims made" option applies on the general liability policy. As used here, this is on the underlying general liability policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_GeneralLiability_InsurerFullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The full name of the insurer of the underlying general liability policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_GeneralLiability_PolicyNumberIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The policy number of the underlying general liability policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_GeneralLiability_PolicyEffectiveDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The effective date of the underlying general liability policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_GeneralLiability_PolicyExpirationDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The expiration date of the underlying general liability policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_EachOccurrence_LimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, each occurrence limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying general liability policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_GeneralAggregate_LimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, general aggregate limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying general liability policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_ProductsAndCompletedOperations_AggregateLimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, products and completed operations aggregate limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying general liability policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_PersonalAndAdvertisingInjury_LimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, personal and advertising injury limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying general liability policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_FireDamageRentedPremises_EachOccurrenceLimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, damage to rented premises each occurrence limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying general liability policy.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_MedicalExpense_EachPersonLimitAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The general liability, medical expense each person limit amount.  Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s). As used here, this is on the underlying general liability policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_GeneralLiability_PremisesOperationsPremiumAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The premises operations premium amount on the underlying general liability policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_GeneralLiability_ProductsPremiumAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The products premium on the underlying general liability policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_GeneralLiability_OtherPremiumAmount_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter amount: The premium associated with other coverages on the underlying general liability policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_GeneralLiability_ModificationFactor_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter rate: The combined rating modification and experience modification debit or credit as they apply.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_EmployersLiability_InsurerFullName_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The full name of the insurer of the underlying employers liability policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_EmployersLiability_PolicyNumberIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The policy number of the underlying employers liability policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_EmployersLiability_PolicyEffectiveDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The effective date of the underlying employers liability policy. (MM/DD/YYYY)

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_EmployersLiability_PolicyExpirationDate_A

widgets.tooltip: Enter limit: The workers compensation and employers liability policy, employers liability each accident limit amount. widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_OtherPolicy_CoverageDescription_B

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_OtherPolicy_ModificationFactor_B

widgets.name: Producer_CustomerIdentifier_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter identifier: The customer's identification number assigned by the producer (e.g., agency or brokerage).

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Question_ACBYesIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates defense costs are within aggregate limits.

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Question_ACCYesIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates defense costs a separate limit?

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Question_ACDYesIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates defense costs are unlimited.

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_GeneralLiability_FormEditionDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The edition date of the underlying general liability coverage form.  Policy coverage may vary depending on the edition date of the policy paper. The underlying general liability coverage forms issued by Insurances Services Office (ISO) vary if they are based on the rules of "86" or the rules of "88".

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Question_ACECode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Has any product, work, accident, or location been excluded, uninsured or self insured from any previous coverage?".

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_AnyProductWorkAccidentlocationBeenExcludedUninsuredExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether any product, work, accident or location has been excluded, uninsured or self-insured from any previous coverage.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_ClaimsMade_RetroactiveDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The retroactive date if the policy was issued on a Claims Made basis and there was a retroactive date.

widgets.name: GeneralLiability_ClaimsMade_UninterruptedCoverageEntryDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The retroactive date shown on the applicant's first Claims Made policy.  If this is the first such policy, the date will be the same as the proposed retroactive date shown on the preceding field. If this is a renewal, it is the effective date of the first policy issued in the sequence of uninterrupted Claims Made policies.

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Question_ACFCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "For Claims made, was "tail" coverage purchased for any previous primary or excess policy?".

widgets.name: UnderlyingPolicy_GeneralLiability_TailCoverageEffectiveDate_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter date: The effective date of the tail coverage.  The proposed retroactive date for the policy being applied for should not be earlier than the effective date of the tail coverage.

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_TailCoveragePurchasedAnyPreviousPrimaryOrExcessPolicyExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether tail coverage was purchased for any previous primary or excess policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingCoverage_Coverage_AnyAutoIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the underlying policy coverage any automobile (symbol 1).

widgets.name: UnderlyingCoverage_Coverage_GeneralLiabilityClaimsMadeIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the underlying general liability policy is a claims made policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingCoverage_Coverage_GeneralLiabilityOccurrenceIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the underlying general liability policy is an occurrence policy.

widgets.name: UnderlyingCoverage_Coverage_AircraftLiabilityIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the underlying policy includes aircraft liability coverage.

widgets.name: UnderlyingCoverage_Exposure_AircraftLiabilityIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the limits are less than those shown on the underlying insurance section of the form causing an exposure to exists for aircraft liability coverage.

widgets.name: UnderlyingCoverage_Coverage_AircraftPassengerLiabilityIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the underlying policy includes aircraft passenger liability coverage.

widgets.name: UnderlyingCoverage_Exposure_AircraftPassengerLiabilityIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the limits are less than those shown on the underlying insurance section of the form causing an exposure to exists for aircraft passenger liability coverage.

widgets.name: UnderlyingCoverage_Coverage_AdditionalInterestsIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the underlying policy includes additional interests coverage.

widgets.name: UnderlyingCoverage_Exposure_AdditionalInterestsIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the limits are less than those shown on the underlying insurance section of the form causing an exposure to exists for additional interests coverage.

widgets.name: UnderlyingCoverage_Coverage_CareCustodyControlIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the underlying policy includes care, custody and control coverage.

widgets.name: UnderlyingCoverage_Exposure_CareCustodyControlIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the limits are less than those shown on the underlying insurance section of the form causing an exposure to exists for care, custody and control coverage.

widgets.name: UnderlyingCoverage_Coverage_EmployeeBenefitsLiabilityIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the underlying policy includes employee benefits liability coverage.

widgets.name: UnderlyingCoverage_Exposure_EmployeeBenefitsLiabilityIndicator_A

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Question_AABCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Are services of an Advertising Agency used?".

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_ServicesOfAdvertisingAgencyUsedExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether any services from an advertising agency have been used.

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Question_AACCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Any coverage provided under agency's policy?".

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_AnyCoverageProvidedUnderAgencyPolicyExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether any coverage has been provided under the agency's policy.

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Question_AADCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Does applicant own / lease / operate aircraft?".

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_ApplicantOwnLeaseOperateAircraftExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether the applicant owns / leases / operates aircraft.

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Question_AAECode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Are explosives, caustics, flammables or other dangerous cargo hauled?".

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_ExplosivesCausticsFlammablesOtherDangerousCargoHauledExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether any explosives, caustics, flammable or other dangerous cargo is hauled.

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Question_AAFCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Are passengers carried for a fee?".

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_PassengersCarriedForFeeExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether any passengers are carried for a fee.

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Question_AAGCode_A

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_AnyUnitsNotInsuredUnderlyingPoliciesExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether any units are not insured by underlying policies.

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Question_AAHCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Are any vehicles leased or rented to others?".

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_AnyVehiclesLeasedRentedOthersExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether any vehicles are leased or rented to others.

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Question_AAICode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Are hired and non-owned coverages provided?"

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_HiredAndNonOwnedCoverageProvidedExplanation_J
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether any hired and non-owned coverages are provided.

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Question_AAJCode_A

widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether any bridge, dam, or marine work is performed.

widgets.name: Contractors_WorkContractedDescription_A

widgets.name: Contractors_AgreementDescription_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: The description of the contractual agreement(s) pertaining to the work performed.   ACORD 101, Additional Remarks Schedule, may be attached if more space is required.

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Question_ABACode_A

widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether a hospital or first aid facility is maintained.

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_Question_ABFCode_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter Y for a “Yes” response. Input N for “No” response. The response to the question, "Do current or past products, or their components, contain hazardous materials that may require special disposal methods?".

widgets.name: CommercialUmbrellaLineOfBusiness_CurrentOrPastProductsContainHazardousMaterialsExplanation_A
widgets.tooltip: Enter text: An explanation as to whether current or past products, or their components, contain hazardous materials that may require special disposal methods.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_PollutionLiability_GeneralLiabilityWithPollutionExclusionIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the insured carries a general liability policy with standard Insurance Services Office pollution exclusion coverage.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_PollutionLiability_GeneralLiabilitySuddenAndAccidentalOnlyIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the insured carries a general liability policy with standard sudden and accidental only coverage.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_PollutionLiability_GeneralLiabilityWithPollutionCoverageIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the insured carries a general liability policy with a pollution coverage endorsement.

widgets.name: ExcessUmbrella_PollutionLiability_SeparatePollutionCoverageIndicator_A
widgets.tooltip: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the insured carries separate pollution coverage.
